scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,panel,client-api,client-web -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --workspace auth-server" "npm run dev --workspace sso-panel" "npm run dev --workspace client-backend" "npm run dev --workspace client-frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace sso-panel && npm run build --workspace client-frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace auth-server && npm run test --workspace client-backend
